message:
feat(parallel-parser): add deterministic source-order merge and witness_hash

Rewrite merge_chunks() to produce canonical token ordering independent
of chunk iteration order by sorting on composite key (start, end,
chunk_index, token_ordinal). Add witness_hash field to MergeWitness
computed from per-chunk content hashes and merge metadata via
compute_merge_witness_hash(), enabling downstream verification that
the merge operation is reproducible.

Add token_kind_code() and compute_chunk_hash() helpers. Extend
compare_witnesses() in the interference gate to cover the new
witness_hash field. Includes unit and integration tests for
merge-order independence and witness hash determinism.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
